Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

UCH1 protos B

OBD Information

Protocol: ISO8
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: AE
Func Name: UCBIC ISO8

Requests

[
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "6100010104",
    "name": "activation des actuateurs",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Nombre de cycles": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Organe à activer": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Temps activation": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Temps inactivation": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "4002000000",
    "name": "Ecriture bit de calibration",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Fonction écriture bit de calibration": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "N° du bit à modifier": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Valeur à affecter au bit": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "4007000000",
    "name": "Ecriture codes clés",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "00 écriture code clé": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Fonction écriture codes clés": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "N° octet code clé à modifier": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Valeur à affecter à l octet code clé": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "4000000000",
    "name": "Ecriture date interv diag",

      "supplier"
    ],

      },

        "firstbyte": 2,

      },

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Mois intervention diag": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      }

  },

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 4,

  },

    ],

  {
    "minbytes": 16,
    "sentbytes": "50",
    "name": "Identification",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Demande trame 0": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "LSB octet de compens. pour checksum AA55H": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true
      },
      "MSB octet de compens. pour checksum AA55H": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "N° de Version du programme, soft": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "N° de Version hard LSB, Indice évolution produit": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      },
      "N° de Version hard MSB, sous niveau hard": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Numéro application": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Numéro client": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "OCTET 13 T0 LIBRE": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "ref": true
      },
      "OCTET 14 T0 LIBRE": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      },
      "OCTET 15 T0 LIBRE": {
        "firstbyte": 16,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Référence Renault": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

    "sentbytes": "32",
    "name": "Mode diag Etudes",

  {
    "minbytes": 11,
    "sentbytes": "51",
    "name": "Salve N° 1",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Demande trame 1": {
        "firstbyte": 1,

    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Anti-démarrage engagé": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Anti-scanning code manuel en cours": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Calibration terminée": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Clé présentée est non vierge, lockée": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Code clé valide, authentification réussie": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Défaut écriture EEPROM": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Erreur BCC dans la réponse": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Etat arrêt fixe EV avant": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 2,

        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 7,

      },

        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 3,

      },

        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 4,

      },

        "firstbyte": 3,

      },

      },

        "firstbyte": 9,

        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 5,

    "minbytes": 17,
    "sentbytes": "59",
    "name": "Salve N° 9",

        "ref": true

        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },

      },

        "firstbyte": 7,

        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 9,
